## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between SentinelOne and GrowthX to explore potential content and SEO partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and SEO optimization services, combining expert talent with advanced AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [SentinelOne is considering GrowthX's services to augment their existing content strategy and boost organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Key decision points: aligning GrowthX's offerings with SentinelOne's current SEO agency engagement and internal roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Potential kickoff date: April 28th, pending internal alignment and budget discussions at SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering Overview

  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise for content creation, optimization, and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Services include editorial content creation, content refreshes, and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Staffing model: Managing Directors, Managing Editors, Content Managers, and supporting AI/engineering teams](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Pricing: $21,000/month for 50,000 words of editorial/refreshes and 1,200 programmatic pages annually](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Pilot period to establish quality benchmarks and workflow, with full ramp-up by week 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### SentinelOne's Current Content Initiatives

  - [Launched Cybersecurity 101 over the summer, now with 1,000+ articles](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Currently refining key pages and implementing testing](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Recently onboarded an SEO agency (2 weeks ago) with aggressive growth targets (45% YoY organic traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)

### Integration and Workflow Considerations

  - [GrowthX can integrate with SentinelOne's CMS (likely Sanity or Contentful)](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Initial manual content staging by GrowthX, with potential for automation later](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Weekly reporting on content performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Ability to work alongside existing SEO agencies, though GrowthX prefers direct engagement for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Brief overview of content volume from competitors like Palo Alto Networks](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)
  - [Discussion on aggressive content strategies in the security space](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)

## Next Steps

  - [SentinelOne team (Drew, Bryan, Mahati) to align internally on potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Discuss budget considerations for FY26 planning](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Evaluate how GrowthX's services could complement or replace current SEO agency work](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [SentinelOne to review proposal and consider April 28th kickoff date](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up questions to clarify SentinelOne's specific needs and goals](https://fathom.video/share/QK6uT7HsU3LUyZWZn2Lzjtf4HYBKCzsj?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
